raw_text: calle berlín, 2 madrid, 28028 648238334 rocamva94@gmail.com roberto campelo valencia academic education 2012-13/2015-16: grado en ingenieria aeroespacial: university of león. during my tfg had to design a structural test machine for drones wings. the structure had to be able to emulate the forces that the plane has to resist during his operational life. at the same time had to be able to measure the deformation that the wing experience. in the same way receive good formation about turbojets and reciprocating engines because of the militar facilities in la virgen del camino. 2009-10/2011-12: bachillerato: sagrado corazón jesuitas in león. complementary education advance course of flight simulator university of león, 60 hours. initation course level catia v5r20 servicad, 42 hours. aptitudes advance level in microsoft office autocad matlab catia vsr20 arduino i oi on nn c programming. work history football referee: 12 division provincial aficionados, in leon 2009-2016 languages spanish- native english- low c1 level in toeic exam 905 points listening & reading 350 points speaking & writing another matters of interest driving license b hobbies: team sports, especially football. reading, papiroflexia. team-worker, open minded, persistant and willing to work and learn sn kn volunteer work: used to help children do their homework at a special place with prepared people supervising them. x lam currently a beneficiary of the guarantee fund youth in madrid. página 2 roberto campelo valencia
